## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? What is the use case?

## Proposed Solution

What should the feature look like? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you considered? Why isn't the current workaround sufficient?

## Additional Context

Any relevant examples, references, or prior art.
